description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional couch with a right-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, dark gray fabric. The couch features clean, straight lines and a minimalist design, with low-profile armrests and backrests that are consistent in height. The seating area is divided into three main seat cushions, with the chaise section forming an extended lounging area. Two dark blue accent pillows are placed on the left side, adding a subtle contrast to the overall color scheme. The couch stands on short, slender metal legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, giving it a contemporary appearance. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with plush foam cushioning for comfort.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional couch in dark gray fabric with a right-facing chaise, low-profile arms, and two blue accent pillows. It stands on short metal legs and features clean, minimalist lines.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three seat cushions, right-facing chaise, and two blue accent pillows on the left.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the low, straight armrest and backrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the division between the main seating and chaise sections.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the chaise extension and the placement of the accent pillows on the far side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions with a right-side chaise extension, three back cushions forming a continuous backrest, and two loose blue accent pillows on the left section.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, slender, exposed metal legs with a simple cylindrical shape and a slight taper, providing minimal elevation.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, low-profile armrests with a rectangular cross-section, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous, and attached backrest with three segments, each corresponding to a seat section, and no visible tufting or division beyond the cushion seams.
